basic_details.job_title: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 15 Anganwadi Worker, Anganwadi Helper Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Child Development Project Officer Poshan Khanyar
basic_details.short_information: Child Development Project Officer Poshan Khanyar (CDPO Poshan Khanyar) Recruitment 2026: Child Development Project Officer Poshan Khanyar has released the official notification for 15 Anganwadi Worker, Anganwadi Helper posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

important_dates.application_start_date: 08 July 2026 (15 Days from the date of publication)

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Anganwadi Worker (Sanginis): 10+2 and maximum graduation. Anganwadi Helper (Sahayikas): Matriculation or 8th standard.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CDPO Poshan Khanyar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: jkicds.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CDPO Poshan Khanyar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CDPO Poshan Khanyar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CDPO Poshan Khanyar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CDPO Poshan Khanyar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Anganwadi Worker (Sanginis): 10+2 and maximum graduation. Anganwadi Helper (Sahayikas): Matriculation or 8th standard.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

content_sections.heading: CDPO Poshan Khanyar Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.date: 08 July 2026 (15 Days from the date of publication)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CDPO Poshan Khanyar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: jkicds.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CDPO Poshan Khanyar Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anganwadi Worker/Helper posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form is 08 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for these positions?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 37 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Anganwadi Worker?
faq.answer: For the Anganwadi Worker (Sanginis) post, candidates must have completed 10+2 and can have a maximum of graduation.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for Anganwadi Helper?
faq.answer: For the Anganwadi Helper (Sahayikas) post, candidates should have completed Matriculation or at least the 8th standard.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies announced for the Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper positions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Anganwadi Worker/Helper posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve the creation of a Merit List followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir.
